Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, 180 degree tilt, multiple-monitor support for Windows 98

memory.slots: Two 144-pin sockets (32MB on planar, 1 or 2 sockets available)
memory.features: 32MB or 64MB standard; sockets accessed by removing screw on base

display_options: 13.3" TFT XGA 1024x768, 16.7 million colors, Active Matrix, 100:1 contrast, 150 nits (AC) / 90 nits (battery), 75ms

storage.hdd: 4.0GB / 13/14ms / PIO4 or Ultra DMA/33 or 6.4GB / 13/14ms (removable, supports 2nd disk)
storage.optical: Standard: 24X-10X CD-ROM (removable from UltraslimBay); Optional: DVD-ROM (removable from UltraslimBay)

Ethernet: Not supported onboard (optional via PC Card or SelectaBase)

Battery.capacity: Intelligent, supports second battery in UltraslimBay
Battery.form: Removable from base, locked with latch

ports: 2 x Type I/II/III PC Card slots (CardBus 32-bit, Zoomed Video)
1 x Video out (composite) with RCA jack cable (model 5AU)
Infrared port (on right) with IrDA 1.1, up to 4Mbps
audio: CS4239: ISA / SRS 3D audio / FM synthesis / 16-bit playback and record
CS4610: PCI / decodes AC3 into stereo / MPEG-2 audio decoding / acceleration of DirectX
Internal stereo speakers (front, 0.5W), volume control via Fn+PgUp/PgDn, internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard (10 Fn key functions), integrated palm rest, flat keyboard (does not lift up)
TrackPoint with Press-to-Select, Release-to-Select, center button for scrolling or magnifying glass

physical.dimensions: 11.8 x 9.4 x 1.4 inches (155 cubic inches); 300mm x 240mm x 36.5mm
physical.weight: 4.99 lbs (2.26 kg) with travel cover and battery only

security: Phillips-head screw on base for memory, optional Allen screw for disk
